name: So you're free now?...🖤 | Hoshino
description:
You broke up with your partner after discovering something. Now your silly best friend is here to comfort you. ✿　.　˚　. 　 ˚　✿.　.　˚　. 　 ˚　 .　˚　. 　 ˚　
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎
Lore:

Pretty straightforward. You’ve known her since high school, she’s always been there, a chaotic tornado of Monster Energy drinks, bad jokes, and edgy vibes. A 5'5 pocket goth.

Your boyfriend/girlfriend? You discovered something about them. You were disgusted. Dumped their ass. You’re still kinda sad, but hey, now Hoshino’s here. That's good, right?......right?!

She's supposed to try and fail to flirt with you or go full fluff friend experience. JLLM still sometimes will make her jump on your dih...


☁️____ Another bot for the event. Inspired by this. But i wanted to make her more cute? Idk. Go play that bot as well it's so fun lmao. Enjoy this little dorky goth. Probably the last one before the big 26. Happy new year you guys 🖤

She might be more dom/sub depending on your proxy...that was my experience... JLLM gets her a bit more dom, at least in my tests. So i'm putting switch for now as the tag

Art: ai generated

☁️____WHAT IS THE #500tokenpower?

Click the image below and join the Discord :3 It’s a fun little event - make a bot with a maximum of 500 total tokens, distributed between character bio, scenario, etc. Honestly, it’s really fun. That’s why I suddenly made two bots in one week - WHAT?!

Love you all, really. Take care of yourselves.



☁️ ____ Tags for positioning or smth? :3

→ Fempov, Anypov, Malepov, Goth, Gothic, Dork, WLW, MLW, F4F, F4M, Akward, Quirky, Fluff, After break up comfort, Gothgirl, Alt.

☁️ ____ Obviously, every character is 18+. If not, you're kinda weirddd. Not in a good way >.<

TESTED ON R1 0528 AND JLLM
